title: Operator smoke: PAT regen + >=3 scheduled syncs
description: Operator regenerates PAT, updates .env, recreates container, verifies sync succeeds, monitors >=3 scheduled syncs
tests: Regenerate PAT in Firefly profile -> API tokens
Manual Sync now -> state:completed with entity counts
If 401 recurs: /sync page shows Unauthorized display message (CC ops check)
